message:
fix: skip broadcast send with zero subscribers, remove unnecessary clone, clean test imports

events.rs: guard all_sender.send() with receiver_count > 0 check to
avoid SendError when no all-event subscribers exist. Add test verifying
routed delivery count without all-event subscribers.

runtime.rs: remove unnecessary content.clone() — pass
bounded_segment.content.as_str() directly to detect_with_context,
avoiding a String allocation per segment.

mcp.rs: remove unused #[cfg(test)] serde::Deserialize import.

web.rs: remove 8 unused #[cfg(test)] imports (RecvError, mpsc, select,
signal, sleep, task, timeout, EventQuery, SegmentScanQuery, BoxFuture,
ControlFlow, Method, Middleware, RequestContext, ResponseBody, Error,
json_err, json_ok).

egress_tap_integration: remove unnecessary mut on rx bindings (3 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
